name: Research Process Quality
description: Evaluates evidence of systematic, multi-perspective research rather than shallow information retrieval

source_diversity.description: Does the report draw from a variety of source types (academic, industry, government, primary data) rather than a single viewpoint or type?

counterargument_coverage.description: Does the report acknowledge alternative perspectives, dissenting evidence, or limitations of the prevailing view?

synthesis_quality.description: Does the report synthesize information across sources into coherent insights, rather than just summarizing each source separately?

recency_awareness.description: Where relevant, does the report distinguish between older and more recent findings, and flag areas where the landscape is evolving?
